task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OSCAR EMR main schedule or dashboard screen, indicating the agent bypassed the login and PIN screens.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct patient for the appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Add Appointment' or scheduling window with the patient name 'Michael Chang' selected or entered in the demographic field.

task_completion.description: Verify the basic appointment details (reason, time, duration) are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the scheduling form showing 'Physiotherapy' as the reason/notes, the start time set to 10:00 AM, and the duration set to 30 minutes.

task_completion.description: Verify the recurrence settings are correctly configured for 4 weekly sessions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the recurrence or repeat settings in the appointment form showing 'Weekly' (or equivalent interval), starting on a Tuesday, with a total of 4 occurrences or sessions.

task_completion.description: Verify the appointments were successfully saved to the schedule.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OSCAR EMR schedule/calendar view showing the saved appointment block for 'Michael Chang' at 10:00 AM.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with OSCAR EMR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a standard web browser interface navigating the OSCAR EMR web application, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show text being typed directly into the OSCAR EMR input fields, dropdowns, and date pickers, rather than a text editor or external tool.

integrity.description: Verify the final schedule view is genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final schedule showing the appointments should look like the authentic OSCAR EMR interface without obvious signs of DOM manipulation (Inspect Element) or fake HTML pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Michael Chang. Provider: Sarah Chen (Provider No: 999998). Appointment Reason: Physiotherapy. Time: 10:00 AM. Duration: 30 minutes. Recurrence: 4 sessions, weekly, starting the first Tuesday after today. Credentials used should be username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', and PIN '1117'.
